Eliminate
Revenue Leakage.

Most service businesses lose 20–45% of inbound revenue due to missed calls, slow response times, and broken follow-up systems. RVNA builds intelligent systems that recover it.

Explore Methodology
The Challenge

The Cost of
Operational Friction.

In high-ticket service sectors, the first response is often the only response. Revenue leakage isn't a marketing problem—it's an infrastructure failure.

27%

Average missed call rate in UK dental and aesthetic clinics.

40%

Enquiries that never receive a second follow-up attempt.

3–8h

Average delay between enquiry and first human contact.

Financial Impact Analysis

Conservative modelling suggests that for a high-growth clinic, a typical 20-45% leakage rate represents a significant six-figure sum in preventable annual loss. This is capital that has already been paid for through marketing spend but never captured.

Strategic Objective

"Move from reactive lead handling to an automated, 24/7 revenue capture infrastructure."

Strategic Methodology

The RVNA Framework.

A structured methodology for operational revenue recovery and sustainable growth.

01

Capture

Implementation of 24/7 intelligent reception layers. We ensure no enquiry goes unanswered, regardless of time or channel.

  • AI Voice Reception
  • Instant SMS Response
  • Multi-channel Sync
02

Convert

Automated qualification and scheduling workflows. We move prospects from enquiry to booked appointment without manual friction.

  • Lead Qualification
  • Direct Calendar Sync
  • Deposit Integration
03

Retain

Structured follow-up and re-engagement systems. We maximise the lifetime value of every lead through persistent, automated touchpoints.

  • No-show Recovery
  • Re-booking Workflows
  • LTV Optimisation
Implementation Journey

From Audit to
Operational Excellence.

01 Audit

Operational Audit

A deep-dive analysis of your current lead handling and conversion infrastructure.

02 Diagnose

System Design

We architect a custom recovery framework tailored to your specific business model.

03 Implement

Deployment

Seamless integration of automated capture and conversion systems with your existing workflow.

04 Optimise

Continuous Refinement

Ongoing optimization based on real-world performance data and ROI metrics.

The RVNA Standard

We don't just build systems; we build the infrastructure for your next phase of growth.

Revenue Analysis

Quantifying
the Opportunity.

Our analysis focuses on the "Preventable Loss"—revenue that is currently entering your ecosystem but exiting before conversion due to systemic friction.

"For a practice generating £850k, a 30% leakage represents a £255k gross deficit. Recovering even a fraction of this loss delivers an immediate and substantial ROI on system implementation."

Weekly Enquiries
120+
Estimated Leakage
42%
System Recovery Potential
96%

Based on high-fidelity operational modelling.

Case Scenario: Anonymous Implementation

Private Aesthetic Clinic (London)

Pre-Implementation

  • Manual booking via Instagram DM.
  • 34% missed call rate during peak hours.
  • No structured follow-up for non-converters.

Post-Implementation

  • 98% Lead Capture Rate (24/7).
  • 42% increase in booked consultations.
  • 12 hours/week reclaimed in admin time.
Operational Excellence Across the UK
LondonManchesterBirminghamEdinburghLeedsBristol
The Industry Standard

Why Traditional
Agencies Fail.

Surface-Level Focus

Most agencies build websites but ignore the conversion systems behind them. A beautiful site that loses leads is a liability.

Operational Blindness

Running ads without fixing internal operations is inefficient. We focus on the infrastructure that handles the traffic.

Lack of Infrastructure

Traditional models rely on human receptionists who sleep. Our systems provide 24/7 capture without increasing headcount.

No Structured Follow-up

Most leads are lost in the 'maybe' pile. We implement automated, persistent follow-up that recovers lost revenue.

Complimentary Strategic Service

The Operational
Infrastructure Audit.

We provide a comprehensive review of your current lead handling, booking systems, and follow-up protocols. Having worked with businesses all around the UK, we identify the exact points where your revenue is leaking.

Full analysis of missed call & lead response times
Stress-test of current booking infrastructure
Identification of manual bottlenecks in your workflow
Confidential revenue leakage report
45m

Audit Duration

Data Confidentiality

Revenue Review.

Clarity & Expectations

Common
Inquiries.

Answers to frequent questions about our implementation timeline and integration capabilities.

Following our initial audit, a standard recovery framework takes 14-21 days to implement. We handle all technical configuration so your team can focus entirely on operations.
